subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath fulfilled His promise and sent down unto His servant Jawád that which He had pledged, and caused to descend from the heaven of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انجز وعده و ارسل الی عبده جواد ما وعده و انزل من سماء المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
